summary: Iteration 20 testing complete. All 11 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified: Multi-step registration form (5 steps), admin registrations management, approval workflow creating academy players, and homepage 'Δήλωσε Ενδιαφέρον' button linking to /academy/registration.
seed_data_creation: Multiple test registrations created during testing. Approved registrations auto-created academy players.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 tested the Academy Registration feature. Key findings: 1) Multi-step form at /academy/registration works with 5 steps (Παίκτης, Γονέας, Ιατρικά, Όροι, Πληρωμή). 2) Step validation works - required fields show errors. 3) Medical step has Yes/No toggles that reveal detail fields. 4) Consent checkboxes in Step 4 are required. 5) Step 5 has payment method selection (3 options) and digital signature pad. 6) POST /api/registrations creates registration with status 'pending'. 7) Admin panel ΑΚΑΔΗΜΙΑ > Εγγραφές shows registrations with filter buttons (Όλες, Εκκρεμεί, Εγκρίθηκαν, Απορρίφθηκαν). 8) Sidebar shows pending count badge on Εγγραφές. 9) Registration detail view shows 6 info cards. 10) PUT /api/admin/registrations/{id}/status with 'approved' + assigned_group_id creates academy player. 11) Homepage 'Δήλωσε Ενδιαφέρον' button links to /academy/registration.

registration_page.step_indicator: PASS - Shows 5 steps: Παίκτης, Γονέας, Ιατρικά, Όροι, Πληρωμή
registration_page.step1_validation: PASS - Required fields (first name, last name, DOB, gender, address, city) show errors
registration_page.step_navigation: PASS - Next button advances steps, Back button goes back
registration_page.step2_parent_form: PASS - Parent/Guardian form + Emergency contact fields work
registration_page.step3_medical: PASS - Yes/No toggles reveal detail fields when Yes selected
registration_page.step4_consents: PASS - 6 consent checkboxes (participation, medical, GDPR, media, liability, financial)
registration_page.step5_payment: PASS - 3 payment options (Μετρητά, Κάρτα, Μεταφορά) + signature pad
registration_page.signature_pad: PASS - Canvas-based signature pad works with mouse drawing
registration_page.success_page: PASS - Shows success message with parent email

admin_registrations.tab_loads: PASS - ΑΚΑΔΗΜΙΑ > Εγγραφές tab shows registrations list
admin_registrations.filter_buttons: PASS - Όλες, Εκκρεμεί, Εγκρίθηκαν, Απορρίφθηκαν filters work
admin_registrations.pending_badge: PASS - Sidebar shows pending count badge on Εγγραφές
admin_registrations.detail_view: PASS - Click row shows detail with 6 info cards
admin_registrations.info_cards: PASS - Player, Parent, Emergency, Medical, Consents, Payment/Signature cards
admin_registrations.admin_actions: PASS - Group assignment dropdown, notes field, Approve/Reject buttons
admin_registrations.approve_workflow: PASS - Approve with group creates academy player
admin_registrations.reject_workflow: PASS - Reject updates status to rejected

homepage_link.button_exists: PASS - 'Δήλωσε Ενδιαφέρον' button found on homepage

backend_apis.POST /api/registrations: PASS (200) - Creates registration with pending status
backend_apis.GET /api/academy-groups: PASS (200) - Returns U12, U7, U9 groups

design_review.text_contrast: PASS - White/zinc text on dark background provides good contrast
design_review.form_styling: PASS - Consistent dark theme with gold (#F5A623) accents
design_review.step_indicator: PASS - Clear visual indication of current step
design_review.error_messages: PASS - Red error text visible on validation failures
design_review.signature_canvas: PASS - Orange stroke color visible on dark background
